text:
CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
CMMI Data Sharing (CMDS) — Entity File
Version — April 2025
SAS name Label Type Length Format Values
MODEL_ID Model Identifier CHAR 2 refer to Model ID tab
MODEL_NAME Model Name CHAR 256
ENTITY_ID Entity Identifier CHAR 10
ENTITY_NAME Entity Name CHAR 256
ENTITY_TYPE Entity Type CHAR 3 MDC = Medicare Enrolled Provider/Supplier
FAC = Medicare Facility 
HSP = Medicare Hospital
PAC = Post-Acute Care Medicare Facility
PRA = Medicare
